title: ArdaGrass
description: A Fabric alternative to Optifine's "Better Grass".
body:
What is ArdaGrass?

ArdaGrass is a Fabric alternative to Optifine's "Better Grass" feature that changes the sides of grass blocks to show the top texture instead when other grass blocks are nearby. This is to make terrains such as grassy hills and plains look more realistic and unbroken by strips of dirt. ![grass_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/90wM2vXN/images/1b2ef04f50f65313e7341182df91bc0c8fba04ef.png)
